---
title: "🔱 STERILE AGENT INITIALIZATION"
---

# ◤ THE STERILE AWAKENING ◢

This protocol initializes a sterile, isolated agent environment for high-fidelity testing and logic loop validation.

## COMMANDS

```powershell
# 1. Scaffolding
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path ".agents/workflows" -Force;

# 2. Synchronizing Core Workflows
# [ALFRED]: Relative paths now enforced for portability.
$SourceDir = "sterileAgent"
$Files = @("lets-go.qmd", "run-task.qmd", "investigate.qmd", "wrap-it-up.qmd", "SovereignFish.qmd")
foreach ($f in $Files) {
    Copy-Item -Path "$SourceDir\$f" -Destination ".agents/workflows\" -Force
}

# 3. Synchronizing Mandates
$Mandates = @("AGENTS.qmd", "wireframe.qmd", "dev_journal.qmd", "thesaurus.qmd", "fishtest_data.json", "tasks.qmd", "memories.qmd")
foreach ($m in $Mandates) {
    Copy-Item -Path "$SourceDir\$m" -Destination ".\" -Force
}
```

[ALFRED]: "The sterile sector is prepared, sir. No host contamination detected."
